name: GIGABYTE Z690 AERO G (rev. 1.x) ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Support DDR5-6000(OC) - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 4x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2x2 Type-C (DP Alt mode) - HDMI 1.4 - DisplayPort - Intel 2.5GbE LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi6 - BT 5.2
shortName: GIGABYTE Z690 AERO G (rev. 1.x) ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
